content.en:
Another half a year has passed.

Ye Tian didn't know how many destructive creatures he had killed on the Cosmic God Battlefield, although he had been in the middle of a battle, the Cosmic God Battlefield really didn't have any pressure on him at all.

"There have been a lot fewer destroyed creatures recently, and it seems that the Destruction Abyss Turmoil should be able to be suppressed in a long time!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he glanced at his four teammates.

At this time, the faces of each of the four of them were full of tiredness.

After all, they had been fighting for half a year in a row, and had been surrounded by countless cosmic god destruction creatures many times, even if they were under the protection of Ye Tian, they were under a lot of pressure.

But no matter what, they survived.

this day.

Ye Tian and the others received the news that the first batch of cosmic gods could withdraw from the cosmic god battlefield and be replaced by the second batch of cosmic gods to replace the battle.

The Wan Race did not regard the first batch of cosmic gods as cannon fodder, so they also took into account the mental and state problems of many cosmic gods who had been fighting for too long.

Add to that the fact that after such a long battle, the lack of resources is also a problem.

Therefore, the first batch of cosmic gods has limited combat power, and they can withdraw from the battlefield and return to the race.

"It's finally time for the day of return!"

The Seven Sword Divine Lord rejoiced.

Immediately, he asked Ye Tian, "Lord of the Ten Thousand Laws Divine Lord, do you want to go back to the human race?"

"No!" Ye Tian shook his head, "I'm going to enter the Domination-level battlefield!"

"What, Lord of the Ten Thousand Law Gods, the Domination-level battlefield, that's too dangerous, you will face a large number of Domination-level destruction creatures!!" The Seven Swords Divine Lord and the others persuaded.

"Don't worry, I'm sure!"

Ye Tian smiled faintly.

Seeing this, the Seven Sword Divine Lord and the others stopped talking.

Besides, they are not qualified to persuade.

Moreover, they didn't know what the limit of Ye Tian's true combat power was, even if he was surrounded by countless destructive creatures, Ye Tian would still be able to break the game.

Perhaps, their worries are just unnecessary.

A few days later, the Seven Sword God Lord and other cosmic gods left the Cosmic God Battlefield and returned to the human race.

And a new batch of cosmic gods has also come to the cosmic god battlefield!

Domination of the battlefield.

Ye Tian stepped into this area and met some masters.

These were very surprised by Ye Tian's arrival, and some masters persuaded Ye Tian to leave, but Ye Tian basically ignored them.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to encounter the first Juggernautry-level Destruction Creature on the Juggernaut-level battlefield.

Without saying a word, the battle began.

Ye Tian easily killed this Domination-level Destruction Creature, and continued to look for other Domination-level Destruction Creatures.

Although Ye Tian's cultivation was only at the peak of the Universe God, and his combat power was not as good as that of Tianzun, he was enough to dominate at the master-level level, so he was not worried about the danger he would encounter in the master-level battlefield.

Unless he's unlucky enough to run into a Celestial-level destructive creature.

But if there is a Celestial-level destructive creature on the dominant-level battlefield, there will be a Celestial-level or Supreme to dominate the battlefield and destroy this Celestial-level destructive creature.

Therefore, it is unlikely that Ye Tian will be unlucky.

Thundered!!!!

A terrifying wave came from far away.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank.

Because, this is the breath of the Heavenly Venerable, and the breath is full of destructive energy.

Obviously, this is a Celestial-level destructive creature.

Moreover, this Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature was coming towards him.

He could sense this Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature, and obviously this Celestial-level destructive creature must also be able to sense his breath.

"There must have been a fight!"

Ye Tian guessed.

If he escaped now, if he could escape, that Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature would not necessarily chase him.

But in this case, the juggernauts in the middle of the battle may be in danger, and may even fall.

He won't be merciful, but it's not his style to walk away like this.

Besides, Tianzun really can't deal with it?

"My Death Flower Emperor has been cultivated to the peak of the Universe God with my efforts, but the Death Flower Emperor is able to cultivate the Death Flower Emperor, and the sea of Death Flowers formed by countless Universe God-level Death Flowers is enough to withstand the attack of the Heavenly Venerable for me. Although I can't beat the Tianzun level, the Tianzun level can't kill me in one move!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he flew over.

Soon, he saw the Celestial-level destructive creature, and at the same time, he also saw the side fighting against the Celestial-Venerable-level destructive creature.

"It's them!"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised.

These people are not the masters, but the sons of those epochs of the twelve cosmic epochs, there are about twenty or so in total, not all the sons of the era, only a small number of them.

At this time, they formed a team and sacrificed a top-level treasure to compete against the Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature.

But even so, they couldn't stop a Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature.

The reason that really kept them from being defeated so far was a puppet, and it was a Celestial-level puppet of the bondage class.

In front of the Tianzun-level destructive creatures, a huge puppet with a body of 10,000 feet flew out of its body, and countless golden threads flew out of its body, binding the Tianzun-level destructive creatures.

As a result, the actions of the Celestial-level creatures of destruction were restricted, otherwise those sons of the era would have died long ago.

"I didn't expect them to have a Tianzun-level puppet!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Among the ten thousand races, he had never heard of a Tianzun-level puppet, and even if there was such a puppet, it would at least require a Tianzun to control it, and now a group of Tianzun-level puppets that a group of cosmic gods could control were absolutely unheard of.

It's a pity that they can't exert the power of this Tianzun-level puppet, and they can't defeat this Tianzun-level destructive creature at all, so they can only barely block it.

But now, this Tianzun-level puppet is full of cracks, and it obviously can't last long.

"Lord of Ten Thousand Laws, we ask for your help!"

One of the sons of the Epoch asked for help.

Ye Tian recognized the other party at a glance, it was the son of the era who had fought with him - Aurora!

"Didn't you call for help?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I asked for help, but not long ago, something happened in the Abyss of Destruction, and a group of supreme-level destructive creatures rushed out, causing the pressure on the supreme-level battlefield to double, and there was no supreme or celestial venerable to support here for a short time. I also ask the Ten Thousand Dharma Divine Lord to forget the past grievances and help us deal with this Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature together. "

Aurora pleaded.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he rushed directly towards the Heavenly Venerable-level Destruction Creature.

"Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord, you come to us and maintain the formation together, if you rush directly like this, you will be killed!"

Aurora's expression changed dramatically and he shouted.

However, it was too late, Ye Tian had already rushed over.

The Tianzun-level destructive creature saw a cosmic god-level ant attacking towards him, and a spear condensed in front of him, directly piercing through Ye Tian.

Burst!

This spear directly pierced Ye Tian's body, but Ye Tian turned a blind eye and directly activated the third form of the Tiangang Battle Method, coupled with the Chaotian Sword, aimed at the Tianzun-level destructive creature and slashed it fiercely.

Boom!

A crack was cut out of the body of the Celestial-level Destruction Creature, and although it was not a major injury, it was a real injury.

And after Ye Tian cut out this knife, he immediately retreated.

The injuries on his body also healed quickly, and he was not seriously injured at all.

"How is that possible!"

Aurora and the other sons of the era looked at all of this, completely stunned.

It stands to reason that a blow from the Tianzun level is enough to kill Ye Tian!

But what's going on now?
